use_cases: Interactive heat map visualization for data dashboards and analytics tools
Physics simulation demonstrations in educational and research contexts
User-interactive art and creative tools leveraging thermal drawing mechanics
Scientific data visualization showing heat distribution patterns
Environmental or industrial monitoring interfaces displaying temperature gradients
ai_summary: A canvas-based thermodynamic heat simulation component that renders a dynamic grid of temperature data using a magma-style thermal color palette. Users interact by clicking and dragging to inject heat points, which diffuse across the grid and gradually cool based on configurable parameters. The component implements a physics-inspired heat dissipation model with real-time animation, making it suitable for scientific visualizations, interactive dashboards, and creative applications.
